description.value:
This special forces unit has some battle mages among their number. War mages can't also have composite bows. The unit loses their Short Salvo ability but gains the following:

Arcane Prepared Spells DC 34, attack +26;

7th @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Eclipse Burst], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Spell Riposte];

6th @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Arrow Salvo], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Chain Lightning], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Wall of Force];

5th @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Detect Scrying], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Fireball], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Slither];

Cantrips (8th) @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Detect Magic], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Light], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Slashing Gust]
